title: Structurally integrated and passively cooled light systems
abstract: Provided herein are systems and methods of providing structural support to a surface, for example a ceiling, with integrated light emitting diode (LED) devices. The structural support further acts as a heat sink, removing heat generated by the LEDs and directing heat in a different direction than the light produced. Advantageously, the structural system and methods contained herein are capable of generating light on one side of a surface, such as a ceiling, while directing heat to the other side, providing the room below the ceiling with high intensity LED light while minimizing the heat introduced into the lighted room by removing the heat upwards and away from the lighted room.
